text:
10.9 - Discharge Issues 
(Rev. 12382; Issued: 11-28-23; Effective: 01-01-24; Implementation:01-02-24) 

A. Hospice Election Mid-Period 

If a patient elects hospice before the end of the 30-day period and there 
was no partial payment adjustment or LUPA adjustment, the HHA will 
receive a full 30-day period payment. The 30-day period with visits less 
than the LUPA threshold for the payment group would be paid at the low 
utilization payment adjusted amount.
